name: roam-mcp
description: Connect Claude to your Roam Research graphs for reading, writing, and searching.
long_description: MCP server for Roam Research. Gives Claude full access to your Roam graphs — create, read, update, and delete pages and blocks, search, run queries, manage files, and navigate your graph. Requires the Roam Research desktop app and a one-time setup step to connect your graph.

tools.name: list_graphs
tools.description: List all configured graphs with their nicknames

tools.name: setup_new_graph
tools.description: Set up a new graph connection, or list available graphs

tools.name: get_graph_guidelines
tools.description: Returns user-defined instructions and preferences for AI agents

tools.name: update_page
tools.description: Update page title or children view type

tools.name: create_block
tools.description: Add markdown content under a parent

tools.name: move_block
tools.description: Move a block to a new location

tools.name: get_open_windows
tools.description: Main window view and all sidebar windows

tools.name: get_selection
tools.description: Currently focused block and multi-selected blocks

tools.name: file_get
tools.description: Fetch a file hosted on Roam

tools.name: file_delete
tools.description: Delete a file hosted on Roam
